items.title: What Mavericks are getting in two-way guard Jett Howard
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: What Mavericks are getting in two-way guard Jett Howard Yahoo Sports

items.title: Jett Howard's two-way contract with the Dallas Mavericks will cover one season. Players are eligible to play on a two-way during their first four years in the league (or five years if they missed one entire season due to injury).
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Jett Howard's two-way contract with the Dallas Mavericks will cover one season. Players are eligible to play on a two-way during their first four years in the league (or five years if they missed one entire season due to injury).
Howard will be an unrestricted free agent in 2027.

items.title: Former #Magic wing Jett Howard has signed a two-way contract with the Dallas Mavericks.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Former #Magic wing Jett Howard has signed a two-way contract with the Dallas Mavericks.

Howard, the No. 11 pick in the 2023 draft, was an unrestricted free agent after Orlando declined to pick up his fourth-year team option last Oct.

items.title: The Dallas Mavericks have signed Jett Howard to a two-way contract.

items.body_excerpt: The Dallas Mavericks have signed Jett Howard to a two-way contract.
